# `grid_ingress_trust`

Validates that the downstream mTLS peer identity matches a configured trusted peer before allowing the request to continue.

## Configuration Notes

Requests without a verified peer identity are rejected with 403. Requests with a peer identity that does not match any trusted peer are also rejected with 403.

## Configuration

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| `trusted_peers` | TrustedPeerConfig[] | yes | Configured trusted peer entries. |
| `trusted_peers[].organization` | string | no | X.509 subject organization to match. |
| `trusted_peers[].serial_number` | string | no | Certificate serial number to match. |

## Example

```yaml
filter: grid_ingress_trust
trusted_peers:
  - organization: praxis-grid-e2e
```
